name: Edgegap
description: Edgegap — Distributed game server hosting on 650+ edge locations with sub-10ms matchmaking and autoscaling by player count.

seo.title: Edgegap — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Edgegap: Edgegap — Distributed game server hosting on 650+ edge locations with sub-10ms matchmaking and autoscaling by player count.

when_to_use: Game server hosting on 650+ edge locations with sub-10ms latency
Autoscaling multiplayer game servers by player count globally
Dedicated server allocation near players without managing infra
Reducing netcode latency in competitive multiplayer games
Replacing costly fixed-region game servers with dynamic edge

review.verdict: A genuinely differentiated distributed game hosting option when low ping matters more than price.
review.best_for: Competitive multiplayer titles sensitive to regional latency
review.not_for: Casual games where any single region is good enough

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
